headline: Is FDXF Stock a Buy With Growth Targets Amid High Debt and Macro Risks
summary: FDXF pairs scale, pricing tools and growth targets with high debt, soft demand and spin-off execution risks, making it a hold currently.

headline: 3 Air-Freight & Cargo Stocks to Watch in a Promising Industry
summary: Shareholder-friendly moves and cost-cutting actions bode well for the Zacks Transportation-Air Freight and Cargo industry. UPS, FDX and GXO are well-poised to capitalize on the bright scenario.
